scripts.dev: npm --prefix ../shared run build && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.api:smoke: npm --prefix ../shared run build && npm run content:validate && prisma generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && tsx src/smokeTest.ts
